row_name: NEW: Lucidworks Conversational Q&A AI Agent
new_value: Launched 2026-05-06. AI agent for highly technical Q&A using info from technical PDFs, spec sheets, images, and product manuals. Includes session-history conversational memory for natural follow-up questions. Vendor: Lucidworks. Category: enterprise search agent w/ session memory. Press: GlobeNewswire 2026-05-06.

row_name: NEW: NVIDIA Inference Context Memory Storage Platform (CMX / ICMS)
new_value: Announced 2026 (BlueField-4 GA H2 2026). AI-native storage tier for gigascale agentic inference; extends GPU memory capacity, enables high-speed context sharing across nodes, claims 5x tokens/sec + 5x power efficiency. Bridges gap between GPU HBM and general-purpose storage; petabyte-scale RDMA-accelerated context storage. Coordinated via NVIDIA DOCA, Spectrum-X Ethernet, Dynamo, NIXL. Category: dedicated memory layer / infrastructure. Partners: IBM Storage Scale, Supermicro, VAST Data.

row_name: NEW: Anthropic Auto Dream / AutoDream (Claude Code)
new_value: Research preview, May 2026 (server-side feature flag rollout; not all users yet). 'REM-sleep' style memory consolidation: between sessions, sub-agent scans memory directory + recent transcripts, prunes stale notes, merges duplicates, resolves contradictions. Toggle via /memory inside session ('Auto-dream: on' selector). Category: Claude Code memory. Coverage: TheNewStack, MindStudio, claudefa.st, Tessl, Jeremy Nguyen X thread. Companion to Anthropic Managed Agents Memory beta (Apr 23, 2026).

row_name: NEW: Anthropic Managed Agents Memory (public beta)
new_value: Public-beta launch 2026-04-23, two weeks after Managed Agents GA (2026-04-08). Filesystem-based agent memory; agents learn cross-session, write/read via bash + code-execution tools. Files exportable via API or Claude Console. Audit log per session-event with rollback/redact. Early-adopter results: Rakuten reported 97% fewer first-pass errors. Category: dedicated memory layer in Claude managed agents. Coverage: SD Times, InfoQ, Techzine, EdTech Innovation Hub. (Note: this product already has a row in the landscape; included here for cross-ref.)

row_name: NEW: Mistral Vibe — Remote Agents / Mistral Medium 3.5
new_value: Launched 2026-05-02. Cloud-based remote-agent platform powered by Mistral Medium 3.5; reports 77.6% on SWE-Bench Verified. Server-side conversation-state management; complement to Mistral Agents API. Category: agent framework / coding agent. Coverage: MarkTechPost, NewStack, AIBusinessReview.

Released 2026-05-04. Open-source persistent memory MCP for AI agent pipelines (LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, Claude). REST API + MCP transport + knowledge graph + autonomous consolidation. v10.36.6 includes formal taxonomy: 5 base types (observation, decision, learning, error, pattern) with 21 subtypes, plus cryptography bump for CVE-2026-39892. Category: Claude Code memory MCP / framework-agnostic memory layer.

Launched / actively released 2026. High-performance code-intelligence MCP server; indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph; average repo indexed in milliseconds; 155 languages supported, sub-ms queries, claims 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies. Category: Claude Code memory MCP / code-intel.

arXiv paper (2605.01567), May 2026. 'Feedback-Normalized Developer Memory for Reinforcement-Learning Coding Agents: A Safety-Gated MCP Architecture.' Local-first, MCP-native developer-memory architecture for RL coding agents; treats memory selection as a logged contextual decision process (issue_match, issue_feedback, issue_record_resolution). Category: research paper / MCP server design pattern.

CES 2026 announcement (Jan 2026; ongoing 2026 rollout). Developer-first reference platform for AI wearables; Large Visual Memory Model (LVMM) 2.0 to give wearable AI human-like contextual memory. Category: voice/wearable memory infrastructure. Pre-existed task window but rapidly maturing through 2026.

row_name: NEW: Google Cloud Next 2026 — Memory Bank + Memory Profiles + Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform
new_value: Google Cloud Next 2026 (April 2026). Memory Bank + new Memory Profiles announced; Vertex AI rebranded as Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, unifying agent dev + governance + optimization. Architectural shift to AI agents as 'continuous operators' rather than one-shot tools. Category: dedicated memory layer / agent framework.
